warnings: Second of 2 views on this page; sibling is the floor-1 plan view _view1_st3_floor1_plan.json.

Same naming-discrepancy warning as view1: this 'ST.3' (architecture) very likely corresponds to structural sheet S-12's 'ST2' (ระดับชานพัก-พื้นชั้น 2) based on matching step counts and floor levels -- flagged, not reconciled.

The step numbering sequence shown here (13,14,15,16,17 then separately 11,10,9,8,7,6,5) with '12' printed alone suggests the landing sits between steps 12 and 13, consistent with the structural drawing's 12-step lower flight + 6-step upper flight (12+6=18 total, close to the 17 max number visible here -- small discrepancy of 1 step, possibly due to a shared landing step counted differently between the two disciplines).
